data.name: Folders_AddFolderHint
data.value: Click "Add Folder" to configure your first folder

data.name: Devices_AddDeviceHint
data.value: Add a device to start synchronizing files.

data.name: Msg_DeleteDeviceConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to remove "{0}"?

data.name: Settings_ShowTransferChartHint
data.value: Display network throughput graph on dashboard

data.name: Settings_ShowRecentEventsHint
data.value: Display recent sync events on dashboard

data.name: Settings_NotifyDeviceConnectHint
data.value: Notify when device connects or disconnects

data.name: Settings_NotifyPendingDeviceHint
data.value: Notify when a new device wants to connect

data.name: Settings_ResetToDefaultsHint
data.value: Settings reset to defaults. Remember to save changes.

data.name: Msg_RestartConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to restart?

data.name: Msg_ShutdownConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to shutdown?

data.name: Msg_DeleteConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this item?

data.name: Msg_DeleteFolderConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to remove folder "{0}"?

data.name: Settings_IgnorePermissionsHint
data.value: File permission changes will not be synced

data.name: Settings_StartAtLoginHint
data.value: Automatically start when you log in

data.name: Msg_ApiKeyGenerated
data.value: New API key generated. Remember to save changes.

data.name: Network_NATTraversalHint
data.value: Automatically configure port forwarding for better connectivity

data.name: Network_UPnPHint
data.value: Universal Plug and Play port forwarding

data.name: Network_RenewalIntervalHint
data.value: Time before lease expires to renew

data.name: Network_GlobalDiscoveryHint
data.value: Announce to global discovery servers for internet-wide device discovery

data.name: Network_LocalDiscoveryHint
data.value: Discover devices on local network via broadcast/multicast

data.name: Network_GlobalDiscoveryServersHint
data.value: One server URL per line (default = use Syncthing servers)

data.name: Network_RelayingHint
data.value: Use relay servers when direct connection is not possible

data.name: Network_RelayOnlyModeHint
data.value: Only connect through relay servers (no direct connections)

data.name: Network_RelayWithoutGlobalAnnounceHint
data.value: Use relays even when global discovery is disabled

data.name: Network_RelayServersHint
data.value: One server URL per line (default = use default relay pool)

data.name: Network_ApplyLimitsToLANHint
data.value: Also apply bandwidth limits on local network connections

data.name: Msg_NetworkSettingsSaved
data.value: Network settings saved. Some changes may require a restart.

data.name: Advanced_Warning
data.value: These settings are for advanced users. Incorrect configuration may affect performance or cause sync issues.

data.name: Advanced_DefaultFolderPathHint
data.value: Default path for new synced folders

data.name: Advanced_IgnorePermissionsHint
data.value: Don't sync file permissions (useful for cross-platform syncing)

data.name: Advanced_AutoNormalizeFilenamesHint
data.value: Automatically convert filenames to NFC Unicode normalization

data.name: Advanced_LowPriorityProcessHint
data.value: Run with lower CPU priority (reduces system impact)

data.name: Advanced_ReduceProgressUpdatesHint
data.value: Less frequent UI updates (saves bandwidth on slow connections)

data.name: Advanced_KeepTemporaryFilesHint
data.value: Don't delete temp files on error (for debugging)

data.name: Advanced_CopyOwnershipFromParentHint
data.value: New files inherit ownership from parent directory

data.name: Advanced_OpenBrowserOnStartHint
data.value: Automatically open the web GUI when the application starts

data.name: Advanced_EnableCrashReportingHint
data.value: Send anonymous crash reports to help improve the software

data.name: Msg_ResetDatabaseConfirm
data.value: This will reset the sync database. All folders will need to rescan. Continue?

data.name: Msg_DatabaseResetInitiated
data.value: Database reset initiated. Folders will rescan.

data.name: Msg_FactoryResetConfirm
data.value: This will delete ALL settings and data. This action cannot be undone. Are you absolutely sure?

data.name: Msg_FactoryResetTypeConfirm
data.value: Type 'RESET' to confirm you want to delete all data.

data.name: Msg_FactoryResetComplete
data.value: Factory reset complete. Application will restart.

data.name: Msg_AdvancedSettingsSaved
data.value: Advanced settings saved. Some changes require a restart.

data.name: About_Description
data.value: Syncthing-compatible file synchronization with Creatio management

data.name: About_LicenseText
data.value: Licensed under GPL-3.0. Protocol files derived from Syncthing (MPL-2.0).

data.name: About_FeaturesList
data.value: Syncthing-compatible file sync|End-to-end encryption|NAT traversal & relay support|Creatio platform integration|Modern Web UI

data.name: Events_NoEventsMatch
data.value: No events match the current filter criteria

data.name: Support_Description
data.value: A support bundle contains diagnostic information that helps troubleshoot issues. It includes configuration, logs, and system information but excludes sensitive data like API keys and passwords.

data.name: Support_FolderStatusHint
data.value: Sync status of all folders (paths redacted)

data.name: Support_RedactDeviceIdsHint
data.value: Replace device IDs with anonymized identifiers

data.name: Log_NoEntriesMatch
data.value: No log entries match the filter

data.name: Pending_AutoAcceptDescription
data.value: Auto-Accept allows devices to automatically accept folder share requests. Enable this on individual devices via Device Settings or when accepting a pending device below.

data.name: Pending_AllRequestsProcessed
data.value: All device connection requests have been processed.

data.name: Msg_DeviceAcceptedAutoAcceptFailed
data.value: Device '{0}' accepted (auto-accept could not be enabled)

data.name: Msg_RejectDeviceConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to reject '{0}'? This device will need to request connection again.

data.name: Msg_NoFoldersConfigured
data.value: There are no folders configured. Accept the device first, then add folders later.

data.name: FolderErrors_NoErrors
data.value: No errors found for this folder.

data.name: FolderErrors_ErrorsFound
data.value: {0} error(s) found. These files failed to sync.

data.name: FolderErrors_HelpText
data.value: Errors usually resolve automatically when the underlying issue is fixed (e.g., file permissions, disk space). You can also try rescanning the folder to clear resolved errors.

data.name: FolderEdit_FileVersioningDescription
data.value: File versioning keeps old copies of files when they are replaced or deleted by other devices.

data.name: FolderEdit_VersioningTypeHint
data.value: Select how old file versions should be retained

data.name: FolderEdit_CustomVersionsPathHint
data.value: Leave empty to use default (.stversions folder)

data.name: FolderEdit_TrashCanDescription
data.value: Trash Can: Moves files to a trash folder when replaced or deleted. Files are kept until cleaned out.

data.name: FolderEdit_SimpleDescription
data.value: Simple: Keeps a specified number of old versions for each file.

data.name: FolderEdit_VersionsToKeepHint
data.value: Number of old versions to retain

data.name: FolderEdit_StaggeredDescription
data.value: Staggered: Keeps versions with decreasing frequency over time. Recent changes keep more versions, older changes keep fewer.

data.name: FolderEdit_MaximumAgeHint
data.value: Maximum age of versions to keep (default: 365 days)

data.name: FolderEdit_ExternalDescription
data.value: External: Runs an external command when a file is about to be replaced. The command receives the file path as an argument.

data.name: FolderEdit_CommandRequired
data.value: Command is required for external versioning

data.name: Msg_ResetToDefaults
data.value: Settings reset to defaults. Remember to save changes.

data.name: Settings_Network_UpnpEnabledDesc
data.value: Universal Plug and Play port forwarding

data.name: Settings_Advanced_Warning
data.value: These settings are for advanced users. Incorrect configuration may affect performance or cause sync issues.
